Class AnimationTrack

Namespace
UnityEngine.Timeline
Assembly
Unity.Timeline.dll
[TrackClipType(typeof(AnimationPlayableAsset), false)]
[TrackBindingType(typeof(Animator))]
public class AnimationTrack : TrackAsset, ISerializationCallbackReceiver, IPropertyPreview, ILayerable
